text: Hey, what time are we meeting tomorrow?
Can you send me the recipe for that pasta we had last night?
URGENT: Your account has been suspended. Please click here to verify your identity and restore access immediately.
Dear customer, your RBI security team has detected suspicious activity. Please share the 6-digit OTP sent to your phone to secure your bank account.
A very long message that just keeps going and going and going without saying anything of substance, but it might contain a random link at the end like http://example.com/nothing-important
